results.description: Cargo.toml exists at root
src/lib.rs or src/main.rs exists
src/ directory exists
No nested src/ dirs (src/src/)
benches/ directory exists (if benchmarks declared)
package.name exists
package.version exists
package.edition exists
package.description exists
package.license or package.license-file exists
package.repository exists
package.authors exists
package.rust-version exists
package.keywords exists (libraries)
package.categories exists (libraries)
[lib] path matches existing file
[[bin]] path matches existing file
[[test]] targets declared for tests/ files
[[bench]] targets have harness = false
No undeclared test files
No undeclared bench files
[[example]] targets exist if examples/ present
[[test]] paths resolve to existing files
Package name uses kebab-case
Source files use snake_case naming
No uppercase in source file names
Module file names match mod declarations
Binary names use hyphens or underscores
Test files use correct suffixes (_test.rs, _int_test.rs, _e2e_test.rs, etc.)

Test function name prefix follows location-aware convention: <feature>_<type_kind>_<fn>_<suffix> for tests/<file>.rs; <type_kind>_<fn>_<suffix> for tests/<feature>/<file>.rs (type_kind ∈ {trait,struct,type,enum})

Test function name uses either the conventional test_ prefix or a recognised test-category suffix (_test, _int_test, _e2e_test, _perf_test, _security_test, _stress_test, _load_test, _unit_test, _smoke_test, _contract_test)
Unit tests colocated in source files
No test code in src/ (non-#[cfg(test)])
doc/ or docs/ directory exists (if library)
examples/ directory exists (if library)
No generated files committed (target/)
api/ layer must not import from core/ (L2 must not depend on L3)
saf/ must not re-export from core/ (SAF re-exports from api/ and spi/ only)
api/traits.rs must exist (SEA interface contract)
Core modules must implement their api traits (impl <Trait> for)
Core items (struct, enum, type, trait, fn, const, static) must use pub(crate) visibility, not bare pub
saf/mod.rs must exist (SAF facade entry point)
saf/ must not define new pub structs (facade layer only re-exports and wires)
lib.rs must delegate public surface to saf/ via pub use
lib.rs must not declare core as public (pub mod core is forbidden)
lib.rs must not declare api as public (pub mod api is forbidden — all layers must be private)
spi/ must not import from core/ (L2 peers must not depend on each other)
When spi/ exists, lib.rs must declare `mod spi` (private, not pub mod)
spi/ must not import from saf/ (L2 must not depend on L3)
core/ must not import from spi/ (L2 peers must not depend on each other)
scripts/ci/ directory exists (if scripts/ present)
scripts/ci/build.sh exists (if scripts/ci/ present)
scripts/ci/test.sh exists (if scripts/ci/ present)
scripts/ci/lint.sh exists (if scripts/ci/ present)
Root contains only allowed entries (whitelist enforcement)

violations.message: Unexpected entry 'scripts' at feature level (not in feature whitelist)
violations.expected: Only entries from the feature whitelist
violations.fix_hint: Fix the issue detected by builtin check 'root_whitelist'

violations.message: Unexpected entry 'struct.toml' at feature level (not in feature whitelist)
violations.expected: Only entries from the feature whitelist
violations.fix_hint: Fix the issue detected by builtin check 'root_whitelist'

results.description: Trait names must be singular (not plural)

violations.message: Trait 'BreakerTransitions' appears to be plural; trait names should be singular
violations.fix_hint: Rename trait to singular form (e.g., 'BreakerTransition')

results.description: tests/ directory exists at same level as src/
Reports deprecated trait definitions in api/traits.rs for tracking
core/ must not define traits (L3 contains implementations only)
SEA layer directories must not contain crates (no Cargo.toml inside api/, core/, saf/, spi/)
Core module filenames must match their primary struct/trait name (with suffix tolerance)

violations.message: core file 'src\core\breaker_client.rs' has no struct/trait/enum definitions
violations.expected: At least one type named like 'BreakerClient'
violations.fix_hint: Add a primary type 'BreakerClient' or remove the file

violations.message: core file 'src\core\transitions.rs' has no struct/trait/enum definitions
violations.expected: At least one type named like 'Transitions'
violations.fix_hint: Add a primary type 'Transitions' or remove the file

results.description: Types in core modules must be name-cohesive (SRP enforcement)
Suggest Builder pattern for complex structs (advisory)
application_type must be defined in project metadata
Project structure must match declared application_type
Integration tests must not use mocking libraries or mock types
Dependencies used in src/ must have integration or e2e test coverage
Dependencies declared in Cargo.toml must be used in src/
CLI projects should use dirs/directories crate for XDG-compliant paths
No hardcoded home directory paths in source code
Test files use suffixes consistent with dependency scope (allowing integration-style *_int_test.rs / *_e2e_test.rs in tests/)
lib.rs must declare gateway as a private module — pub mod and pub(crate) mod are forbidden
Each api/ trait has a corresponding test file in tests/
saf/ must wrap all non-deprecated api/ traits as standalone public functions
Each public struct/trait/enum must have its own .rs file (one primary type per file)

violations.message: File contains 2 public types: GrpcBreakerClient, BreakerNode
violations.fix_hint: Move each struct/trait/enum to its own file named after the type (e.g., `Scanner` → `scanner.rs`)

violations.message: File contains 3 public types: BreakerState, Admission, Outcome
violations.fix_hint: Move each struct/trait/enum to its own file named after the type (e.g., `Scanner` → `scanner.rs`)

results.description: Rust source file names must be nouns (no verb or assertion names like check_exists.rs)
mod.rs must contain only module declarations and re-exports — no struct/impl/fn logic
No loose .rs files directly under src/core/ — all code must live in subfolders

violations.message: Loose file 'breaker_client.rs' found directly under src/core/
violations.expected: All code under src/core/ must live in subfolders
violations.fix_hint: Move loose files into appropriate subfolders (e.g., `core/engine.rs` → `core/engine/scanner.rs`)

violations.message: Loose file 'transitions.rs' found directly under src/core/
violations.expected: All code under src/core/ must live in subfolders
violations.fix_hint: Move loose files into appropriate subfolders (e.g., `core/engine.rs` → `core/engine/scanner.rs`)

results.description: Sibling files sharing a common prefix must be grouped into a subdirectory module (e.g., check_runner.rs + check_result.rs → check/runner.rs + check/result.rs)

violations.message: 3 files in src/api/ share prefix 'breaker': breaker_client, breaker_config, breaker_state — group into src/api/breaker/
violations.fix_hint: Create a subdirectory named after the shared prefix and move files into it (e.g., `check_runner.rs` → `check/runner.rs`)

results.description: Every core/ struct with pub/pub(crate) methods must implement a trait defined in api/ (program to the interface)
core/ must not import from spi/ — depend on api/ traits, receive implementations via DI from saf/
core/ must not import from gateway/ — depend on api/ traits, receive implementations via DI from saf/
api/ must not import from core/ — api/ defines abstractions, it must not depend on implementations
api/ must not import from spi/ — api/ defines abstractions, it must not depend on implementations
api/ must not import from gateway/ — api/ defines abstractions, it must not depend on implementations
gateway/ must not import from spi/ — gateway/ depends on saf/ only, not on SPI implementations
Each source file in SEA layers has coverage via inline tests, a matching test file, or a layer-level test file in tests/ — reports per-layer coverage
Every {implementation_layer}/ submodule must have a corresponding {interface_layer}/ submodule defining its types or traits
Config struct methods must be pub(crate), not pub — configs are not for public consumption
Module name must not prefix the struct/trait name (e.g., config::Config not config::ConfigConfig)
Every pub/pub(crate) fn in core/ must have an inline unit test (#[cfg(test)] block with #[test])
Every pub fn in saf/ must have corresponding public-API test coverage (_e2e_test.rs, _int_test.rs, or a layer-level saf_* test)
saf/ must not re-export traits via pub use — wrap trait methods as standalone functions instead
Root must not have both build and bootstrap scripts
src/gateway/ must exist (prerequisite gate for rules 132-133)

violations.message: Directory 'src/gateway' does not exist
violations.fix_hint: Create the directory 'src/gateway'

results.description: gateway/mod.rs must declare pub(crate) mod input

result.reason: Dormant: would fire when prerequisite rule(s) 131 pass

results.description: gateway/mod.rs must declare pub(crate) mod output

result.reason: Dormant: would fire when prerequisite rule(s) 131 pass

results.description: core/ must not import from saf/ — core/ depends only on api/ traits
spi/ must not import from gateway/ — spi/ implements api/ traits only
gateway/ must not import from core/ — gateway/ calls saf/, not core/ directly
saf/ must not import from gateway/ — gateway/ calls saf/, not the reverse
Directory names under src/ must use snake_case
SEA layer files must contain substantive code (not just comments or empty re-exports)
lib.rs must be a real entry point, not a shim with only re-exports
SEA layer mod.rs must not be a crate-level re-export shim
SEA layer directories must meet minimum LOC threshold (api/>10, core/>20, saf/>5)
[lib] and [[bin]] paths must point inside src/
Non-standard [lib] path with src/ present suggests shim directory
Free functions in saf/ or core/ taking an api-defined type as parameter should be methods on that type
Package name must not use SEA layer suffixes as defined in sea_layers config
Workspace root Cargo.toml must not contain [package] — workspace roots must be virtual
Test file prefix must match a source module name, optionally followed by a pub fn name
Weak filesystem patterns — code that produces host-dependent paths (MAIN_SEPARATOR, hardcoded \\, replace-hacks, literal backslashes)
Feature crate must have config/application.toml for runtime configuration
service_type must be defined in project metadata
api/traits.rs must contain the primary trait matching service_type

violations.message: api/traits.rs is missing `pub trait Processor` — required for service_type 'processor'
violations.fix_hint: Add `pub trait Processor` to src/api/traits.rs or re-export it with `pub use`

results.description: core/ must implement the primary api trait (impl <PrimaryTrait> for)

violations.message: core/ has no `impl Processor for` — service_type 'processor' requires an implementation in core/
violations.fix_hint: Create a struct in src/core/ (e.g. DefaultProcessor) and add `impl Processor for DefaultProcessor`

results.description: Every non-orchestrator crate must have a Validator trait in api/traits.rs

violations.message: api/traits.rs is missing `pub trait Validator` — required for non-orchestrator crates
violations.fix_hint: Add `pub trait Validator` to src/api/traits.rs and implement it in src/core/validator.rs

results.description: Test functions must not be placeholders (panic!/todo!/unimplemented!/unreachable!/empty body)
saf/ public function signatures must not name types from core/ (signature leak)
All public types (struct, enum, trait, type alias) must be declared under api/ — no other layer is a legal declaration site
Each pub type/trait in api/ must be in its own standalone file with the file stem matching the snake_case name

violations.message: api/ file 'src/api/breaker_client.rs' contains `pub struct GrpcBreakerClient` but the file stem 'breaker_client' does not match — expected 'api/grpc_breaker_client.rs'
violations.fix_hint: Rename the file to 'api/grpc_breaker_client.rs' (matching the snake_case of 'GrpcBreakerClient'). Update the parent mod.rs to reference the new filename and update any `use` paths across the crate.

violations.message: api/ file 'src/api/breaker_config.rs' contains `pub struct GrpcBreakerConfig` but the file stem 'breaker_config' does not match — expected 'api/grpc_breaker_config.rs'
violations.fix_hint: Rename the file to 'api/grpc_breaker_config.rs' (matching the snake_case of 'GrpcBreakerConfig'). Update the parent mod.rs to reference the new filename and update any `use` paths across the crate.

violations.message: api/ file 'src/api/builder.rs' contains `pub struct ApplicationConfigBuilder` but the file stem 'builder' does not match — expected 'api/application_config_builder.rs'
violations.fix_hint: Rename the file to 'api/application_config_builder.rs' (matching the snake_case of 'ApplicationConfigBuilder'). Update the parent mod.rs to reference the new filename and update any `use` paths across the crate.

violations.message: api/ file 'src/api/transitions.rs' contains no pub type/trait declarations — every file in api/ must contain exactly one public interface item
violations.fix_hint: Add a public type/trait to the file, or move private helpers to a non-api module and delete this file.

results.description: lib.rs must contain only module declarations and re-exports — no struct/impl/fn/const definitions
Only one architecture.toml location is allowed: either architecture.toml at root or main/config/architecture.toml, not both
architecture.toml `layout` field must match the layout implied by Cargo.toml
Every top-level directory at the workspace root must be a declared workspace member or an ancestor of one
